Task.Name: Trinity-CAM (GPT)
Phase 0: Mobilize carve-out governance and TSA baseline
Task.Notes: Programme launch, TSA framing, partner mobilisation, and QG1 concept approval.

Task.Name: 0.1 Governance and partner mobilization
Task.Notes: PMO setup with JCI, Bosch, KPMG, and Infosys.

Task.Name: QG0 - Programme kickoff approved
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Sponsor + Bosch Sponsor | Formal launch of the carve-out starting 2026-07-01 after the TSA period.

Task.Name: Stand up PMO, governance cadence, and workstream RACI
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Weekly governance, steering, RAID, and reporting in place.

Task.Name: Onboard Infosys for merger zone delivery and managed services
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager | Delivery scope confirms merger zone setup, operations, and migration execution.

Task.Name: Baseline TSA towers, service owners, and exit principles
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI IT Manager + Bosch IT Manager | JCI TSA catalogue and exit logic defined for all in-scope IT towers.

Task.Name: 0.2 Separation compliance and stakeholder alignment
Task.Notes: Legal, privacy, communications, and regional alignment.

Task.Name: Define legal perimeter, contracts, and supplier dependencies
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI Legal Counsel + Bosch Legal Counsel | Commercial and legal separation perimeter agreed.

Task.Name: Assess privacy, works council, and cross-border data constraints
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + JCI Legal Counsel | Regional data transfer and employee impact constraints captured.

Task.Name: Launch site change network and stakeholder communications
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Change Lead + JCI HR Lead + Bosch HR Lead | Regional comms and escalation channels activated across 48 sites.

Task.Name: QG1 - Concept and transition model approved
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Sponsor + Bosch Sponsor | Concept sign-off for JCI to merger zone to Bosch integration model.

Task.Name: Phase 1: Discover landscape and design the merger zone
Task.Notes: Detailed discovery of applications, SAP, sites, data, and target merger zone design.

Task.Name: 1.1 Application, SAP, and data discovery
Task.Notes: Discovery across more than 1,800 applications including major SAP scope.

Task.Name: Catalogue 1,800-plus applications and assign transition disposition
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Enterprise Architect + JCI Application Owner + Infosys Application Lead | Classify applications by retain, migrate, replace, retire, and TSA dependency.

Task.Name: Assess SAP landscape, interfaces, and shared services exposure
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + JCI SAP Owner + Infosys SAP Lead | Identify carve-out complexity across SAP systems, interfaces, and shared master data.

Task.Name: Map dependencies and define migration waves for apps and data
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Enterprise Architect + Infosys Application Lead | Wave sequencing aligns critical apps, regional apps, and local edge cases.

Task.Name: 1.2 Merger zone and target-state architecture
Task.Notes: Merger zone blueprint, security, connectivity, workplace, and Bosch end-state landing.

Task.Name: Design merger zone hosting, network zones, and security blueprint
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Target blueprint for temporary merger zone with secure JCI and Bosch connectivity.

Task.Name: Design identity, Active Directory trust, and privileged access model
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys IAM Lead + KPMG Security Architect | Trust path and identity controls support JCI to merger zone to Bosch transition.

Task.Name: Design workplace, M365, collaboration, and service management stack
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Cloud Lead + KPMG Workplace Lead | Email, M365, Teams, endpoint management, and service desk operating design complete.

Task.Name: Design Bosch landing zone integration for post-merger-zone operations
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect + Infosys Programme Manager | Bosch target interfaces, identity landing, and support integration agreed.

Task.Name: 1.3 TSA, migration, and site sequencing design
Task.Notes: TSA service tower design, migration controls, and regional sequencing.

Task.Name: Define TSA service towers, KPIs, and operational reporting
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI IT Manager + Bosch IT Manager | Service lines and TSA metrics defined for transition governance.

Task.Name: Define exit criteria, acceptance tests, and service cutover checkpoints
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + Bosch IT Manager | Each tower receives explicit readiness and exit conditions.

Task.Name: Define data separation controls and reconciliation approach
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + Infosys Data Migration Lead | Controls for business data separation, validation, and audit trail agreed.

Task.Name: Sequence 48 sites and 12,000 users into migration waves
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Deployment Lead + Infosys Service Delivery Lead | Regional wave plan balances business criticality and support capacity.

Task.Name: Design command center, cutover, and hypercare support model
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Service Delivery Lead | Pre-GoLive command center and post-GoLive stabilization model defined.

Task.Name: Phase 2: Build merger zone and prepare transition factory
Task.Notes: Build core platforms, prepare migration factory, and complete test readiness for QG2 and QG3.

Task.Name: 2.1 Merger zone platform build
Task.Notes: Infrastructure, security, identity, workplace, and monitoring build.

Task.Name: Provision merger zone hosting, compute, storage, and base services
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Core hosting platform established for temporary operational landing zone.

Task.Name: Deploy network connectivity, segmentation, and core security controls
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Network Lead + Infosys Security Lead | Connectivity enables progressive site onboarding with required security segregation.

Task.Name: Build identity federation, AD services, and privileged access tooling
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys IAM Lead + KPMG Security Architect | Core identity services ready for user migration into the merger zone.

Task.Name: Stand up M365 tenant, collaboration tools, and service desk platform
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Cloud Lead + Infosys Service Delivery Lead | Workplace and support stack prepared for all migrated users.

Task.Name: Implement monitoring, backup, disaster recovery, and observability
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Operational readiness controls active before broad migration starts.

Task.Name: 2.2 SAP and application transition factory
Task.Notes: SAP carve-out build plus app migration factory and tooling.

Task.Name: Prepare SAP environments, copies, and carve-out configuration path
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Lead + KPMG SAP Architect | SAP technical path into merger zone prepared and validated.

Task.Name: Execute SAP separation build, role redesign, and interface rewiring
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Lead + KPMG SAP Architect + JCI SAP Owner | Shared services, roles, and interfaces aligned to carved-out business scope.

Task.Name: Build migration factory, tooling, and automation for application moves
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + Infosys Data Migration Lead | Migration tooling covers data movement, validation, and evidence collection.

Task.Name: Build and validate wave 1 critical applications in merger zone
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + KPMG Enterprise Architect | Critical application stack prepared first for integrated testing.

Task.Name: Pre-build wave 2 standard applications and package wave 3 edge apps
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + KPMG Enterprise Architect | Standard and specialist applications prepared for accelerated migration execution.

Task.Name: 2.3 Site and user migration readiness
Task.Notes: Endpoint readiness, local playbooks, and pilot readiness across 48 sites.

Task.Name: Build device images, enrollment policies, and endpoint packaging
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Workplace Lead + KPMG Workplace Lead | Endpoint build supports phased user migration into merger zone services.

Task.Name: Prepare regional migration playbooks, floorwalker model, and logistics
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Deployment Lead + Infosys Service Delivery Lead | Regional cutover packs and local support rosters ready.

Task.Name: Run pilot site connectivity and service desk rehearsals
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + JCI IT Manager | Pilot proves merger zone onboarding process and support flows before scaled migration.

Task.Name: 2.4 Test planning and go-no-go preparation
Task.Notes: Formal test planning, mock rehearsals, and readiness evidence model.

Task.Name: Build SIT and UAT plans, evidence templates, and sign-off workflow
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Test Lead + Infosys QA Lead | Common evidence and defect lifecycle agreed for all workstreams.

Task.Name: Run SAP mock cutover rehearsal 1 and capture rollback evidence
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Lead + KPMG SAP Architect | Initial mock validates timing, dependencies, and rollback controls.

Task.Name: Complete operational readiness dossier for command center launch
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager | Evidence package prepared for test-ready milestone and steering review.

Task.Name: QG2 and QG3 - Build complete and test entry approved
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Sponsor + Bosch Sponsor | Merger zone build complete and programme cleared for integrated testing and migration execution.

Task.Name: Phase 3: Test, migrate to merger zone, and prepare Bosch landing
Task.Notes: Formal testing, migration waves, Bosch operational readiness, and QG4 entry.

Task.Name: 3.1 Formal testing and defect closure
Task.Notes: Integrated testing, UAT, security, performance, DR, and regression closure.

Task.Name: Execute end-to-end SIT across SAP, applications, and core services
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys QA Lead + KPMG Test Lead + Infosys SAP Lead | Full end-to-end process flows validated inside the merger zone.

Task.Name: Run performance, security, and disaster recovery validation
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Security Lead + Infosys Infrastructure Architect | Capacity, resilience, and control effectiveness validated for GoLive load.

Task.Name: Run UAT with business teams across all regions and site groups
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Test Lead + JCI Business Lead + Bosch Business Lead | Business users validate SAP and non-SAP journeys needed at cutover.

Task.Name: Close defects, run regression, and obtain UAT closure evidence
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys QA Lead + KPMG Test Lead | Critical and high defects resolved before final readiness stage.

Task.Name: 3.2 Migration waves into merger zone
Task.Notes: Users, applications, and data moved from JCI to the merger zone before QG4.

Task.Name: Migrate user waves 1 and 2 with workplace and identity cutover
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + Infosys Workplace Lead + JCI IT Manager | First half of the user base transitions from JCI to merger zone services.

Task.Name: Migrate user waves 3 and 4 and complete 48-site onboarding
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + Infosys Workplace Lead + JCI IT Manager | All 12,000 users operate from the merger zone before QG4.

Task.Name: Execute wave 1 application and data migration into merger zone
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + Infosys Data Migration Lead | Critical application and data moves completed with reconciliation.

Task.Name: Execute wave 2 application and data migration into merger zone
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + Infosys Data Migration Lead | Standard application estate transitioned and validated.

Task.Name: Execute wave 3 specialist application completion and data closure
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + Infosys Data Migration Lead | Specialist and regional edge applications completed before QG4.

Task.Name: 3.3 Bosch landing and operating model readiness
Task.Notes: Bosch acceptance of connectivity, support processes, and eventual integration path.

Task.Name: Enable Bosch connectivity, identity trust, and operational acceptance
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Manager + Infosys IAM Lead + Infosys Network Lead | Bosch confirms connectivity and identity patterns for downstream integration.

Task.Name: Align resolver groups, service desk, and runbooks with Bosch operations
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + Bosch IT Manager | Support ownership model agreed for post-GoLive stabilization and later handover.

Task.Name: Run final SAP cutover rehearsal and certify rollback readiness
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Lead + KPMG SAP Architect | Final rehearsal confirms cutover steps and fallback timing.

Task.Name: 3.4 Pre-GoLive evidence pack
Task.Notes: Final evidence pack proving all migration and readiness activities are complete.

Task.Name: Reconcile all migrations and archive formal UAT sign-off
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager | Users, applications, and data all reconciled before gate approval.

Task.Name: Finalize infrastructure, SAP, and operational readiness dossier
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Programme Manager + KPMG PMO Lead | Operations, security, SAP, and service evidence complete for steering.

Task.Name: Prepare steering gate deck and cutover recommendation
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Bosch Sponsor + JCI Sponsor | Formal gate recommendation prepared for QG4 decision.

Task.Name: QG4 - Pre-GoLive gate approved
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Sponsor + Bosch Sponsor | Pre-GoLive approval granted; final readiness and open-item closure begins.

Task.Name: Phase 4: Final readiness and GoLive decision
Task.Notes: Mandatory buffer between QG4 and GoLive for closure, checks, rollback rehearsal, and sign-off.

Task.Name: 4.1 Final readiness and open item closure
Task.Notes: No migrations remain; only closure, checks, sign-offs, and command center activation.

Task.Name: Resolve residual defects, confirm health checks, and secure business sign-off
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Test Lead + Infosys Service Delivery Lead + Bosch Business Lead | All QG4 actions closed and no critical alerts remain before cutover.

Task.Name: Activate cutover command center and issue final go decision
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager + JCI Sponsor + Bosch Sponsor | Rollback path revalidated and final go decision issued before GoLive day 1.

Task.Name: GoLive - Day 1 cutover to merger zone complete
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager + JCI Sponsor + Bosch Sponsor | All in-scope users and services operate from the merger zone on GoLive.

Task.Name: Phase 5: Hypercare, TSA exit, and Bosch handover
Task.Notes: Ninety-day stabilization only; no new development or migration after GoLive.

Task.Name: 5.1 Hypercare stabilization only
Task.Notes: Support, hotfixes, enablement, and operational stabilization only.

Task.Name: Run 24x7 incident triage and command center support
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Round-the-clock stabilization support across all regions.

Task.Name: Operate hotfix-only release cadence and eliminate recurring problems
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + Infosys SAP Lead | Bug fixes only after GoLive; no new features or migrations.

Task.Name: Provide user enablement, local floorwalking, and adoption support
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Change Lead + Infosys Workplace Lead | Support users in the new merger zone operating model after cutover.

Task.Name: 5.2 TSA exit and Bosch operations handover
Task.Notes: Tower-by-tower TSA exit followed by Bosch operational ownership uplift.

Task.Name: Execute TSA exits by service tower and confirm acceptance
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI IT Manager + Bosch IT Manager | JCI TSA services closed according to approved exit criteria and acceptance tests.

Task.Name: Transfer knowledge, runbooks, and service ownership to Bosch operations
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Manager + Infosys Programme Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Bosch operations absorb merger zone support knowledge and control model.

Task.Name: Transition merger zone operating model to Bosch steady-state teams
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Manager + Infosys Programme Manager | Operational ownership transitions from project mode to Bosch steady-state teams.

Task.Name: 5.3 Governance closure and archive
Task.Notes: Closure reporting, lessons learned, and artefact archive.

Task.Name: Close financials, capture lessons learned, and archive artefacts
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Programme closure outputs completed and repository artefacts archived.

Task.Name: QG5 - Project completion approved
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Sponsor + Bosch Sponsor | Ninety-day hypercare complete, TSA exited, and handover to Bosch operations complete.
